theme_and_archetype.vibe: Refined Breton Bistro. Grounded, elegant, tactile. Avoiding cheap folkloric cliches, prioritizing an upscale Parisian 16th arrondissement feel with subtle coastal Breton roots.

headings.usage_rules: Use for all major headings (H1, H2). Tracking should be tight (tracking-tight) for sizes above 32px. Do NOT use Inter or generic sans for headings.

body.usage_rules: Clean, highly legible sans-serif for menus, paragraphs, and forms.

accent_labels.usage_rules: Use for overlines, small labels, and categories. Must be uppercase with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl lg:text-[5.5rem] leading-none tracking-tight

rules.contrast: Maintain WCAG AA minimum. Never use pure #000000. Tint blacks towards charcoal/granite (#1A1A1A).
rules.surfaces: Use solid flat backgrounds with very subtle 1px borders (border-slate-200/50) instead of heavy shadows. Forms and inputs should use crisp sharp edges.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use large padding (py-24, py-32) to create breathing room between sections, evoking luxury and calm.
spacing_and_layout.container: Max-width of 7xl (max-w-7xl) with px-6 md:px-12 for standard sections.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol (Tetris Mode) for the About and Gallery sections. Mix spans (col-span-4, col-span-8) to create asymmetry and visual tension.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Strictly sharp or extremely subtle. Use `rounded-none` or `rounded-sm` (2px) maximum for all cards, buttons, and inputs to reflect high-end editorial print.

buttons.primary: Solid ocean_navy (#1B2A47) background, inverse text, rounded-none, px-8 py-4, hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors duration-300.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, border-b border-1 border-slate-900 pb-1 rounded-none hover:text-cider_amber transition-colors.

forms_and_inputs.base: Use Shadcn components heavily customized. rounded-none, border-slate-300, bg-transparent, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-slate-900.

navigation.style: Glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F6F0]/80). Sticky top-0 z-50. Minimalist logo text (Cormorant Garamond). Primary CTA 'Réserver' visible at all times.

hero.layout: Full height (min-h-screen). Immersive background image of bistro interior with overlay bg-black/40. Center-aligned text.
hero.content: Overline: 'CRÊPERIE • BISTROT BRETON', H1: 'Le Jean Michel Breizh', Subtitle: 'L\'âme de la Bretagne au cœur du 16e arrondissement.', CTA: 'Réserver une table'.

about.layout: Asymmetric split layout. Left side: Text heavily padded. Right side: Overlapping images of ocean granite and galettes. Background: #F9F6F0.
about.content: Story of the bistro, merging Parisian chic with traditional Breton buckwheat and cider. Emphasize the high-quality ingredients.

menu_highlight.layout: Two-column list layout (Savory Galettes vs Sweet Crêpes). Use the subtle ermine pattern background (bg-cover/opacity-50).
menu_highlight.styling: Editorial menu style. Item names in Cormorant Garamond text-xl, ingredients in Manrope text-sm text-slate-600. Prices right-aligned.

gallery.layout: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode). 1-4-8 spans. Images must be object-cover, grayscale on hover or subtle zoom-in on hover.

reservation_and_contact.layout: Dark Section (#1D2125). Two columns. Left: Practical Info (Hours, Address, Map). Right: Reservation Form.
reservation_and_contact.note: Use Shadcn form, input, select, popover, calendar.

footer.layout: Massive typography for the brand name (text-[8vw] Cormorant Garamond), bordered links, minimal copyright. background: #1A1A1A, text: #EAE4D9.

pattern_ermine.description: Subtle abstract Breton ermine background pattern

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images should gently scale up (scale-105) over 500ms ease-out on hover. Buttons should invert colors or slide-up background fill.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion for staggered fade-up (y: 30, opacity: 0 -> 1) on scroll for text blocks and gallery items. Keep it subtle and elegant, not aggressive.
motion_and_interactions.lenis_scroll: MANDATORY: Implement lenis smooth scrolling for a premium, heavy momentum feel.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text overlaid on the hero image or granite textures has sufficient contrast. Use drop-shadow or darker overlays if necessary.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: Apply role-based `data-testid` to all interactive elements. E.g., `data-testid="nav-reserve-button"`, `data-testid="reservation-form-submit"`, `data-testid="menu-section"`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Cormorant Garamond, Manrope, Outfit.
Install Shadcn components: button, input, select, form, calendar, popover, toast.
Implement the pages using pure React components (HTML+Tailwind) for layouts, heavily using the bento-grid methodology described.
Override default Shadcn rounding to `rounded-none` or `rounded-sm` across the board.
Use the exact media URLs provided in the media_assets section. Do not use any placeholder services.
The site should feel like a premium editorial spread—lean into asymmetry, generous negative space, and large elegant typography.
